The 'parse' method is a typical implementation, handling input tokens, shifting states, and performing reductions. The 'main' function reads files conditionally, which is normal for command-line utilities but could be leveraged for reading arbitrary files if misused. No network requests, system modifications, or remote communications are observed. There are no indications of malicious data exfiltration, command execution, or backdoors. The code appears to be purely parser infrastructure with no malicious intent.",
